real_world_references: Palantir NHS contract: £23M contract giving Palantir access to patient data for 55 million people across England
Investigatory Powers Act: requires ISPs to store browsing history for 12 months, available to 48 government bodies
Metropolitan Police facial recognition: live facial recognition cameras deployed in public spaces since 2020
COVID-19 NHS data: Palantir's Foundry processed NHS data; contract extended beyond pandemic
